assumptions.text: kcp's APIBinding/APIExport model is the right substrate for offering Tekton-as-a-service across multiple workload clusters at the scale this team plans to grow into.

Scanning/linting tasks succeeding even when they find problems (with results exposed via TEST_OUTPUT convention) communicates issues clearly without misleading users about pass/fail semantics in their CI dashboard.

A 5-minute timeout on SnapshotEnvironmentBindings with an unresolved ErrorOccurred condition is the right heuristic to balance cluster-overload prevention against false-positive cleanup of slow-provisioning environments.
